fields.label: Logo (light backgrounds)
fields.name: site_logo_dark
fields.instructions: Dark wordmark for the white mobile header and inner pages.

fields.label: Group Attribution
fields.name: footer_group_text
fields.default_value: Part of the Travel Seen Group

fields.label: Footer Disclaimer
fields.name: footer_disclaimer
fields.default_value: Some of the flights and flight-inclusive holidays on this website are financially protected by the ATOL scheme. But ATOL protection does not apply to all holiday and travel services listed on this website. This website will provide you with information on the protection that applies in the case of each holiday and travel service offered before you make your booking. If you do not receive an ATOL Certificate then the booking will not be ATOL protected. If you do receive an ATOL Certificate but all the parts of your trip are not listed on it, those parts will not be ATOL protected. Please see our booking conditions for information, or for more information about financial protection and the ATOL Certificate go to: www.caa.co.uk.

fields.label: Username
fields.name: instagram_username
fields.instructions: Public profile handle (without @). Used for profile links.

fields.label: Instagram User ID
fields.name: instagram_user_id
fields.instructions: Numeric Instagram Business/Creator account ID from the Meta Graph API.

fields.label: Access Token
fields.name: instagram_access_token
fields.instructions: Long-lived Instagram Graph API access token. Generate via Meta for Developers (requires Business/Creator account linked to a Facebook Page).

fields.label: Posts to show
fields.name: instagram_post_count
fields.instructions: Default number of recent posts in the Social Grid section.

fields.label: Cache duration (hours)
fields.name: instagram_cache_hours
fields.instructions: How long to cache the feed before fetching new posts.

fields.label: Automated token refresh
fields.message:
Set LUUX_CRON_SECRET in WP Engine environment variables (or wp-config.php). Then add a WP Engine cron job (weekly):

curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SECRET" https://YOUR-SITE.com/wp-json/luux/v1/instagram/refresh

The token auto-refreshes when within 14 days of expiry. A weekly WP Cron backup also runs from the theme.

fields.label: Token expires at
fields.name: instagram_token_expires_at
fields.instructions: Auto-managed Unix timestamp. Set automatically on first save (60 days) and after each refresh.

fields.label: Last refresh
fields.name: instagram_last_refresh
fields.instructions: Auto-managed Unix timestamp of the last successful token refresh.

fields.label: Last refresh error
fields.name: instagram_refresh_error
fields.instructions: Auto-managed. Cleared on successful refresh. If populated, re-authenticate in Meta and paste a new token.
